name: 72.17" Elowen 5 Shelf Bookcase - Threshold™
description:
Flaunt your collection of books, decorative items and more with the 72-Inch Elowen 5-Shelf Bookcase from Threshold™. This bookcase features a metal frame with three open shelves to provide ample space for your books, vases, decorative items and more. Simply place it in your entryway, living room or any other area for functional storage.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
